positive: Minimalist abstract forest grove scene. Central grouping of stylized, symmetrical deciduous trees with delicate, swirling branch silhouettes against a gradient twilight sky. The composition is highly geometric and balanced, suitable for repeat tiling. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, misty teal, and aged cream. Focus on strong black negative space and crisp, elegant linework. Flat design aesthetic with subtle watercolor bleed effect. Composition should be centralized and easily scaled for apparel printing. Overhead view with strong contrast and clean edges.
